member.name: P:HuanyuFlowerShop.Entities.Order.Status
member.summary: 订单状态：pending(待处理), processing(处理中), shipped(已发货), delivered(已送达), cancelled(已取消)

member.name: P:HuanyuFlowerShop.Entities.Order.PaymentMethod
member.summary: 支付方式：cod(货到付款), online(在线支付)

member.name: P:HuanyuFlowerShop.Entities.Order.PaymentStatus
member.summary: 支付状态：unpaid(未支付), paid(已支付), refunded(已退款), partial_refunded(部分退款)

member.name: T:HuanyuFlowerShop.Services.MemoryRateLimiter
member.summary: 基于内存的速率限制器实现

member.name: M:HuanyuFlowerShop.Services.OrderService.CompanyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(物流公司|快递公司)[：:]\\s*([^；,，\\n\\r]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "物流公司".
○ Match the string "快递公司".
○ Match a character in the set [:\uFF1A].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^\n\r,\uFF0C\uFF1B] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:HuanyuFlowerShop.Services.OrderService.TrackingRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(运单号|单号)[：:]\\s*([A-Za-z0-9-]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "运单号".
○ Match the string "单号".
○ Match a character in the set [:\uFF1A].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [-0-9A-Za-z] atomically at least once.

member.summary: 订单状态历史服务实现

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the CompanyRegex method.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompanyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CompanyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
